parameters.content:
## Manual credential selection required
Select real credentials on these nodes before any run (values are never stored here):
- Google Drive OAuth -> Search Inbox Folder, Download Report, Move To Reviewed, Move Duplicate To Reviewed, Move To Rejected
- GitHub -> Get Existing Issues, Create GitHub Issue
- Gmail OAuth -> Send Success / Duplicate / Rejection Email

Also set the recipient placeholder on the three email nodes.

## Safety boundaries
This workflow ONLY: reads Inbox, validates, creates an intake ISSUE, moves the Drive file, emails a notification.
It NEVER commits, pushes, opens/merges PRs, edits repo files, runs SQL, touches Supabase auth/RLS, migrations, secrets, .env, or activates/edits workflows.
GitHub is the source of truth; Drive is intake/export only.
Labels are intentionally not sent so no new labels are auto-created.

## Synthetic test report (manual only)
The "Synthetic Test Report (Manual)" Set node holds one valid sample report and is intentionally disconnected. It never runs automatically.
To test validation without Drive, pin its output into "Validate Report".
It contains no real credentials or private data.

## STAFF-00 — Daily Mission intake (Phase 1)
Deterministic mission normalization + validation. NO AI model is called.
Separate lane, own manual trigger; does NOT touch the report-processing flow, credentials, folder IDs, or existing expressions.
Normalizes to the mission schema, enforces required fields (title, objective, expected_deliverable), applies defaults (priority=normal, budget=0.75, requested_by/source=owner, mode=report-only), rejects budget <0.01 or >5 USD, generates mission_id + mission_hash + received_at, reserves 25% of budget, sets role stop threshold 75%, and caps 1 retry / 1 fallback / 1 critic cycle.
Edit the sample in "STAFF-00 Raw Mission Input (Sample)" to test other missions.

### Guardrails + duplicate protection
- 16 mandatory forbidden_actions always injected + deduped (architecture_change, code_write, branch_create, pull_request_create, merge, production_deploy, auth_change, rls_change, sql_execute, migration_create_or_apply, secret_access_or_change, production_private_data_access, docs_index_edit, knowledge_debt_close, beta_ready_claim, release_ready_claim).
- Duplicate check uses workflow static data, keyed by mission_hash, 7-day retention, max 100 records. Duplicates STOP (duplicate:true + original_mission_id) and do not continue; new missions -> duplicate:false.
- Rejected missions emit a sanitized error (mission_id, failed_node, execution_id, error_message, retry_allowed, sanitized_input_summary). No credentials/tokens/file contents/private data/headers.

## STAFF-00 Role Selection (deterministic, no AI)
After a mission is Accepted, "STAFF-00 Role Selection" maps it to a role team via keyword routing over title/objective/deliverable. Categories: auth/RLS/data, bug investigation, architecture review, market research, beta QA, documentation alignment (default).
Returns activated_roles, skipped_roles, routing_reason, and one minimal Context Pack per activated role (mission_id, role, task, goal, allowed_actions, forbidden_actions, expected_output, token_budget, call_limit, cost_limit_usd, retry_limit, data_classification).
No AI model is connected. "STAFF-01 AI Role Execution" is a DISABLED placeholder for the future AI layer.

## STAFF-01 / STAFF-02 — Role execution layer (DESIGN ONLY, AI DISABLED)
Every AI-execution node is DISABLED and NO model (OpenAI / OpenRouter / other) is connected. Deterministic Code nodes provide synthetic structural-test data so the plumbing can be validated without any AI. Nothing here writes to GitHub, Drive, Gmail, Supabase, or Telegram.

### Flow (after STAFF-00 Role Selection)
1. STAFF-01 Split Context Packs — fan out one item per activated role; preserves mission_id, budget, guardrails, activated/skipped roles.
2. STAFF-01 Execute Role (DISABLED) — future: receives ONE Context Pack, returns ONE Agent Result.
3. STAFF-01 Synthetic Agent Result — deterministic Agent Result per role, marked synthetic:true, report_only:true.
4. STAFF-01 Validate Agent Result — checks required fields + enum status; flags missing evidence for factual recommendations, negative cost, forbidden actions in proposed_changes, secrets/private data. Emits validation_errors (codes only, no raw input).
5. STAFF-01 Collect Role Results — valid_results, invalid_results, total_token_usage, total_estimated_cost_usd, activated_roles, skipped_roles.
6. STAFF-01 Budget Check — blocks when total est. cost > dispatch (75%) budget; 25% reserve preserved; no auto-retry.
7. STAFF-01 Conflict Detection — critic_required only if conflicting recommendations, high-risk-without-evidence, or invalid results. Max ONE critic cycle.
8. STAFF-02 Critic (DISABLED) — future critic pass, no model.
9. STAFF-01 Coordinator Synthesis (DISABLED) — future final synthesis. Output: mission_id, status(completed|blocked|needs_human_approval), activated_roles, skipped_roles, verified_facts, findings, conflicts, recommended_decision, proposed_changes, checks, blockers, token_usage, estimated_cost_usd, next_single_task.
10. STAFF-01 Human Approval Required? — routes when proposed changes include code, branch/commit/PR/merge, architecture, auth/RLS/SQL/migrations/secrets, production data, deployment, DOCS_INDEX, Knowledge Debt closure, or beta/release-ready claims.
11. STAFF-01 Report Only Complete — deterministic terminal; structural test output only; writes to NO external system.

### Future STAFF-02 Critic design (NOT wired yet — straight-through placeholder for now)
- Critic runs ONLY when critic_required: true.
- Maximum critic cycles: 1.
- Critic receives the collected role results + detected conflicts.
- Critic returns ONE reviewed result.
- The reviewed result continues forward to Coordinator Synthesis.
- Do NOT route back to role execution. Do NOT create a workflow cycle. Do NOT connect any AI model.
- Future target wiring: Conflict Detection -> IF Critic Required? -> false: Coordinator Synthesis; true: STAFF-02 Critic -> Merge Critic Result -> Coordinator Synthesis.
- Current state: STAFF-02 Critic (DISABLED) stays as a straight-through disabled pass-through; no IF gate, no merge, no loop-back edge added yet.

## Structural test copy
Inactive test workflow. Schedule trigger disabled. STAFF-00 validates before duplicate persistence. Invalid role results block final status. AI nodes remain disabled. Do not execute the AI Report Bus branch.

## Staff OS structural test — single run
1. Edit **STAFF-00 Raw Mission Input (Sample)**.
2. Start only from **STAFF-00 Mission Trigger (Manual)**.
3. Execute the workflow once from that manual trigger.
4. Inspect **STAFF-01 Report Only Complete** after the lane finishes.

**Do not execute the terminal node directly.** n8n can reuse prior IF-path data.
**Do not run the AI Report Bus branch.** This copy is inactive and test-only.
